item.title: mlverney: Michael Verney @mlverney · 54min Primed for action Cita Johnny Dineen @JohnnyDineen · 1h All the top athletes have littl
item.description: Michael Verney @mlverney · 54min Primed for action Cita Johnny Dineen @JohnnyDineen · 1h All the top athletes have little siestas before their big sporting events. Ronaldo apparently takes 6 naps a day so I’ve a bit to go to catch him up !! x.com/drakesport/sta… 1 2 1 mil
The GAA @officialgaa · 54min Always willing to learn, Eoin Cody is ready for another @gaaleinster SHC with @KilkennyCLG #GAA De gaa.ie 1 mil

item.title: SmallerFishGAA: Smaller Fish @SmallerFishGAA · 1h “It’s an enjoyable brand of hurling…you’ve a bit of freedom, you can get up the field”
item.description:
Smaller Fish @SmallerFishGAA · 1h “It’s an enjoyable brand of hurling…you’ve a bit of freedom, you can get up the field”
I spoke to Darren Morrissey about Galway's running style this year
He was speaking at the Launch of the Leinster hurling championship 4 2 mil

item.title:
officialgaa: The GAA @officialgaa · 1h Barry McNulty is your Player of the Week for the second time this year
The @ManorGaa forwar
item.description:
The GAA @officialgaa · 1h Barry McNulty is your Player of the Week for the second time this year
The @ManorGaa forward scored 1-6, helping @LeitrimGAA overcome Sligo in the Connacht Championship
Take a look at his scores 2 6 3 mil

item.title: MeathGAA: Meath GAA @MeathGAA · 2h 4 seasons in 1 day as Kerry came out on top in the opening round of the Christy Ring Cup in St.
item.description:
Meath GAA @MeathGAA · 2h 4 seasons in 1 day as Kerry came out on top in the opening round of the Christy Ring Cup in St. Loman’s Park on Sunday.
Meath are looking to bounce back to winning ways on Saturday in Round 2 when we travel to Roscommon. Please note the venue has changed and the game will now be Mostrar más 478
